rationale.domain_researcher: Brief requires knowledge of Irish sports landscape (GAA, rugby, soccer, racing), Irish TV channels (RTÉ, TG4, Virgin Media), and streaming services (GAAGO, NOW TV) to populate accurate schedule data.
rationale.ux_designer: Primary users are Irish sports fans — a non-developer audience who need a quick, scannable weekend schedule with clear channel/time info on any device.

coordinator_notes: Tight budget — this is a simple self-contained static HTML/CSS/JS page with hardcoded sample schedule data. No auth, no database, no build step. Domain researcher should focus on realistic Irish sports/channel pairings. UX designer should keep it to one clean responsive view with filtering by sport type. Developer delivers a single index.html file.
